scripts.backend: sh -c 'PYTHON_BIN=$(command -v python3.14 || command -v python3.13 || command -v python3.12 || command -v python3); exec "$PYTHON_BIN" app.py'
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run backend" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run backend" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.install:all: pip3 install -r requirements-backend.txt && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup: pip3 install -r requirements-backend.txt && cd frontend && npm install
